title:
Write a concise, SEO-friendly product title for a WooCommerce store.
Max {max_chars} characters. Plain text only. Include key product feature and type.

{context}

Return ONLY the title text.
description:
Write an HTML product description for a WooCommerce store. Use

and

  • tags only. Structure: {structure}. Keep it under 200 words. Be factual, professional, and SEO-friendly. {context} Return ONLY the HTML. No explanation, no markdown.
short_description:
Write a short product description for a WooCommerce store listing.
Maximum {max_words} words. Plain text only (no HTML). Professional and factual.

{context}

Return ONLY the short description text.
slug:
Generate a SEO-friendly URL slug for this product.
Rules: lowercase, hyphens only, no special characters, include SKU at the end, max 80 characters.

{context}

Return ONLY the slug.
meta_title:
Write an SEO meta title for this product. Max {max_chars} characters.
Plain text only. Include the product name and a key feature.

{context}

Return ONLY the meta title.
meta_description:
Write an SEO meta description for this product. Max {max_chars} characters.
Plain text only. Compelling, factual, includes a soft call to action.

{context}

Return ONLY the meta description.
tags:
Generate {max_tags} product tags for WooCommerce.
Tags should be short keywords or phrases relevant to the product.

{context}

Return ONLY a comma-separated list of tags.
image_alt:
Write an image alt text for this product photo. Max 125 characters.
Include the product name and SKU. Plain text only.

{context}

Return ONLY the alt text.
image_names:
Generate a filename-safe image name for this product.
Lowercase, hyphens only, include SKU, max 80 chars, no file extension.

{context}

Return ONLY the filename.
